title: The Meridian | Fine Dining in New York City
description: Experience seasonal American cuisine with global influences at The Meridian. Reserve your table for dinner, cocktails, private dining, and special events in NYC.

home.title: The Meridian — Where Craft Meets Occasion
home.description: Seasonal American cuisine, craft cocktails, and impeccable hospitality on the Upper West Side of Manhattan.

menu.title: Menus
menu.description: Explore our dinner, cocktail, wine, and tasting menus — crafted with seasonal ingredients and global inspiration.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Meet Chef Marcus Bellamy and the team behind The Meridian. Our story, philosophy, and commitment to exceptional dining.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.description: Reserve your table at The Meridian. Walk-ins welcome at the bar. Private dining available for groups of 8 or more.

contact.title: Contact & Hours
contact.description: Get in touch with The Meridian. Find directions, hours, and ways to reach our team.

events.title: Events
events.description: Wine dinners, chef's table experiences, live jazz, and special seasonal events at The Meridian.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: A visual journey through The Meridian — our dishes, spaces, and moments.

blog.title: Journal
blog.description: Stories from our kitchen, seasonal highlights, wine pairings, and behind-the-scenes at The Meridian.
